top_signals.title: China Says Iran Crisis Shows Nations Must Speed Up Energy Shift
top_signals.summary: Oil and gas shortages triggered by the US war against Iran should be a lesson to countries to accelerate their energy transitions, according to China’s climate envoy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brent falls below $76, notching its lowest level since day before U.S.-Iran war
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rheinmetall Tumbles as Germany Said to Shelve Warships Contract
top_signals.summary: Rheinmetall AG shares fell the most in a year on concern the defense firm will come under pressure as Germany plans to withdraw a major warships contract.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oman Opens Alternative Hormuz Lanes as Shipping Recovery Continues
top_signals.summary: Oman said it would keep the Strait of Hormuz open to shipping without imposing any tolls and had designated two temporary routes north and south of the existing shipping lane to facilitate the safe passage of vessels departing the region.In coordination with the International Maritime Organization…

top_signals.summary: Zcash miner Fortitude Mining, a DCG subsidiary, wants to merge with a small-cap Nasdaq stock, HeartSciences Inc.
